message.magic_storage.no_cells: Connect at least one Storage Cell first
message.magic_storage.no_heart: Insert a Magic Heart to awaken this altar
message.magic_storage.no_crystal: Insert a Magic Crystal — adds +4 cells if the expander is face-adjacent to a Heart
message.magic_storage.expander_not_adjac: Place this expander on one of the 6 faces of a Heart Storage first
message.magic_storage.heart_full: Heart connects up to %s cells — extras are ignored
message.magic_storage.hotbar_protected: Hotbar slots are protected by default
gui.magic_storage.sort.name: Sort: by name
gui.magic_storage.settings.title: Settings
gui.magic_storage.rebind.tooltip: Click, then press a key to dump inventory into storage
gui.magic_storage.rebind.protect.tooltip: Click, then press a key for the slot-marking mode
gui.magic_storage.hotbar.label: Hotbar protection
gui.magic_storage.hotbar.tooltip: When on, Quick Dump leaves your hotbar (slots 0-8) alone. Turn it off to dump the hotbar too and protect individual slots by hand.
gui.magic_storage.settings.hint1: Click a slot to protect or unprotect it.
gui.magic_storage.settings.hint2: Quick: hover a slot and press %s
gui.magic_storage.protect.tooltip: Click slots to lock them from being dumped. Empty slots auto-unlock.
gui.magic_storage.console.title: Resonance Console
gui.magic_storage.console.defrag.tooltip: Re-tune the resonance: compact the network into the fewest cells. Emptied cells fall silent and can be safely removed.
gui.magic_storage.console.cell.hint: Take or place items in this cell. Shift-click sends items back into the network.
book.magic_storage.reigallus1.p1:
The Crown's Commission

I, Reigall, archmage of the crown. Princess Liza wished for a vault to hold the whole kingdom.

A chest is a foolish vessel, so I bound the heartbeat itself with a rune.
book.magic_storage.reigallus1.p2:
And the boxes began to answer a single call.

Craft a Storage Cell and place a Heart Altar beside it — they link on their own.

The altar is mute without a Magic Heart. Seek a librarian who remembers.
book.magic_storage.reigallus1.p3:
Storage Cell
3 by 3 crafting

  C R C
  C H C
  C C C

C — copper ingot
R — redstone
H — chest
book.magic_storage.reigallus1.p4:
Heart Altar
3 by 3 crafting

  R R R
  E D E
  O O O

R — redstone
E — emerald
D — diamond
O — obsidian
book.magic_storage.reigallus2.p1:
Crystal Hands

The third year. The Heart met its limit — runes cannot bind so many vessels at once.

Liza did not ask for a second heart.
book.magic_storage.reigallus2.p2:
She hired the court mages. They forged Crystal Expanders — conduits that widen the sphere of the beat.

Each must touch a face of the Heart, or the resonance dies. Up to six per altar.

The crystal comes from a librarian.
book.magic_storage.reigallus2.p3:
Crystal Expander
3 by 3 crafting

  G C G
  C L C
  G O G

G — gold
C — copper
L — glass
O — obsidian
book.magic_storage.reigallus3.p1:
The Tuning Fork

When the cells grew many, goods scattered across half-empty vessels, and the resonance fell out of tune.

The mages forged a fork tuned to the Heart's beat.
book.magic_storage.reigallus3.p2:
Strike the Heart with the fork to open the Resonance Console — a map of the whole network. Re-tune there, and the contents settle into the fewest cells; the rest fall silent.

Those you may remove and carry off, losing nothing.
book.magic_storage.reigallus3.p3:
Reigall's Tuning Fork
3 by 3 crafting

  G . G
  G A G
  . E .

G — gold
A — amethyst shard
E — echo shard
